name: omninode-tools
description: OmniNode platform tools — ONEX skills, hooks, agents

plugins.name: onex
plugins.description: ONEX architecture plugin with skills, hooks, and agents

onex_cli.notes: The `onex` console_script ships with omnibase-core (>=0.39.0). Python 3.12+ required. MVP install path is pipx; a self-contained Homebrew tap binary is planned (see plan § 4.4 / BF-2).
